---
title: "Royal Rosebuds, or Historical Sketches of Illustrious Children"
---

## Royal Rosebuds, or Historical Sketches of Illustrious Children

**Author:** Frances Maria Wilbraham
**Date:** 1857
**Imprint:** London: Mozley

### Notes

The book is anonymous, but is attributed to Wilbraham on the authority of CMY\'s statement to Alexander Macmillan in 1866.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
